metadata.description: 70 battle-tested product management skills for Claude Code — discovery, strategy, finance, career, and more.

plugins.name: acquisition-channel-advisor
plugins.description: Evaluate acquisition channels using unit economics, customer quality, and scalability.

plugins.name: agent-orchestration-advisor
plugins.description: Design multi-agent AI workflows with clear boundaries, handoffs, and monitoring.

plugins.name: ai-shaped-readiness-advisor
plugins.description: Assess whether your product work is AI-first or AI-shaped across 5 competencies.

plugins.name: altitude-horizon-framework
plugins.description: Understand the PM-to-Director transition through altitude and horizon thinking.

plugins.name: ansoff-matrix
plugins.description: Map evidence-backed growth options across the Ansoff Matrix with risk-rated sequencing.

plugins.name: autonomous-investigation
plugins.description: Protocol for AI research that proceeds without you: evidence labels, search-plan gate, diffable output.

plugins.name: battle-card-builder
plugins.description: Research and draft a competitive battle card from public evidence, every claim labeled and sourced.

plugins.name: business-health-diagnostic
plugins.description: Diagnose SaaS business health across growth, retention, efficiency, and capital.

plugins.name: company-intel
plugins.description: Research a company, industry, or competitor set using web search and seven analytical lenses.

plugins.name: company-research
plugins.description: Create a company research brief with executive quotes, product strategy, and org context.

plugins.name: competitive-analysis-process
plugins.description: Orchestrate a complete six-step competitive analysis, from landscape overview to strategic direction.

plugins.name: competitive-intel-watch
plugins.description: Scheduled delta monitor for competitive shifts: material changes only, with battle-card update flags.

plugins.name: competitive-research-snapshot
plugins.description: Cited competitive landscape research with comparison matrix and so-what implications.

plugins.name: context-engineering-advisor
plugins.description: Diagnose context stuffing vs. context engineering in AI workflows.

plugins.name: customer-journey-map
plugins.description: Create a customer journey map across stages, touchpoints, actions, emotions, and metrics.

plugins.name: customer-journey-mapping-workshop
plugins.description: Run a customer journey mapping workshop with adaptive questions and outputs.

plugins.name: derisk-measurement-advisor
plugins.description: Identify what to measure, test, or track to de-risk a product or AI idea.

plugins.name: director-readiness-advisor
plugins.description: Guide the PM-to-Director transition across preparing, interviewing, and landing.

plugins.name: discovery-interview-prep
plugins.description: Plan customer discovery interviews with the right goal, segment, constraints, and method.

plugins.name: discovery-process
plugins.description: Run a full discovery cycle from problem hypothesis to validated solution.

plugins.name: eol-message
plugins.description: Write a clear, empathetic EOL announcement with rationale and next steps.

plugins.name: epic-breakdown-advisor
plugins.description: Break down epics into user stories with Humanizing Work split patterns.

plugins.name: epic-hypothesis
plugins.description: Frame an epic as a testable hypothesis with target user, outcome, and validation.

plugins.name: executive-onboarding-playbook
plugins.description: Plan a VP or CPO 30-60-90 day diagnostic onboarding path.

plugins.name: feature-investment-advisor
plugins.description: Evaluate feature investments using revenue impact, cost structure, ROI, and strategy.

plugins.name: finance-based-pricing-advisor
plugins.description: Evaluate pricing changes using ARPU, conversion, churn risk, NRR, and payback.

plugins.name: finance-metrics-quickref
plugins.description: Look up SaaS finance metrics, formulas, and benchmarks fast.

plugins.name: incoming-request-advisor
plugins.description: Decode an incoming message into a structured breakdown that separates the literal ask from the job-to-be-done.

plugins.name: intel-discipline-advisor
plugins.description: Triage a competitive question into the right intelligence disciplines, cadence, and executing skill.

plugins.name: intelligence-collection-disciplines
plugins.description: Eight intelligence-community collection disciplines for PMs, with sources, signal chains, and fusion.

plugins.name: jobs-to-be-done
plugins.description: Uncover customer jobs, pains, and gains in a structured JTBD format.

plugins.name: lean-ux-canvas
plugins.description: Guide teams through Lean UX Canvas v2 to frame problems and surface assumptions.

plugins.name: market-landscape-scan
plugins.description: Map a market's segments, players, substitutes, and whitespace with cited evidence before sizing or positioning.

plugins.name: opportunity-solution-tree
plugins.description: Build an Opportunity Solution Tree from outcomes to opportunities, solutions, and tests.

plugins.name: organic-growth-advisor
plugins.description: Identify which organic growth path to pursue — new segments, geographies, channels, or products.

plugins.name: pestel-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze political, economic, social, technological, environmental, and legal forces.

plugins.name: pestel-delta-monitor
plugins.description: Quarterly PESTEL re-scan: which macro factors moved, which assumptions broke, what's new to the frame.

plugins.name: pm-skill-creator
plugins.description: Design a new PM skill through guided conversation.

plugins.name: pol-probe
plugins.description: Define a Proof of Life probe to test a risky hypothesis cheaply.

plugins.name: pol-probe-advisor
plugins.description: Select the right Proof of Life probe type based on hypothesis, risk, and resources.

plugins.name: porters-five-forces
plugins.description: Read an industry's structure through Porter's Five Forces with documented signals and the profit-pool close.

plugins.name: positioning-statement
plugins.description: Create a Geoffrey Moore-style positioning statement for your product.

plugins.name: positioning-workshop
plugins.description: Run a positioning workshop to surface target customer, need, category, and differentiation.

plugins.name: prd-development
plugins.description: Build a structured PRD connecting problem, users, solution, and success criteria.

plugins.name: press-release
plugins.description: Write an Amazon-style press release that defines customer value before building.

plugins.name: pricing-packaging-tracker
plugins.description: Track competitor pricing and packaging as a diffable time series: tiers, gates, and what changed.

plugins.name: prioritization-advisor
plugins.description: Choose a prioritization framework based on stage, team context, and stakeholder needs.

plugins.name: problem-framing-canvas
plugins.description: Guide teams through MITRE's Problem Framing Canvas for clearer problem statements.

plugins.name: problem-statement
plugins.description: Write a user-centered problem statement with who, what, why, and how it feels.

plugins.name: product-sense-interview-answer
plugins.description: Structure a spoken product-sense interview answer with segmentation and MVP tradeoffs.

plugins.name: product-strategy-session
plugins.description: Run an end-to-end product strategy session across positioning, discovery, and roadmap.

plugins.name: proto-persona
plugins.description: Create a proto-persona from current research, market signals, and team knowledge.

plugins.name: recommendation-canvas
plugins.description: Evaluate an AI product idea across outcomes, hypotheses, risks, and positioning.

plugins.name: roadmap-planning
plugins.description: Plan a strategic roadmap across prioritization, epics, stakeholders, and sequencing.

plugins.name: saas-economics-efficiency-metrics
plugins.description: Evaluate SaaS unit economics and capital efficiency for scaling decisions.

plugins.name: saas-revenue-growth-metrics
plugins.description: Calculate SaaS revenue, retention, and growth metrics for momentum diagnosis.

plugins.name: skill-authoring-workflow
plugins.description: Turn raw PM content into a compliant, publish-ready skill.

plugins.name: stakeholder-engagement-advisor
plugins.description: Plan engagement for a specific stakeholder.

plugins.name: stakeholder-identification
plugins.description: Map every stakeholder before engaging anyone.

plugins.name: stakeholder-mapping
plugins.description: Prioritize stakeholders using two complementary grids.

plugins.name: storyboard
plugins.description: Create a six-frame storyboard showing a user's journey from problem to solution.

plugins.name: swot-analysis
plugins.description: Evidence-cited SWOT of one company from public sources, ending with the S-O and W-T crossings.

plugins.name: tam-sam-som-calculator
plugins.description: Calculate TAM, SAM, and SOM with explicit assumptions, methods, and caveats.

plugins.name: user-story
plugins.description: Create user stories with Mike Cohn format and Gherkin acceptance criteria.

plugins.name: user-story-mapping
plugins.description: Create a user story map with activities, steps, tasks, and release slices.

plugins.name: user-story-mapping-workshop
plugins.description: Run a user story mapping workshop with adaptive questions and structured output.

plugins.name: user-story-splitting
plugins.description: Break a large story into smaller deliverable stories using proven split patterns.

plugins.name: voice-of-customer-miner
plugins.description: Mine public reviews, app stores, and forums for unmet needs and competitor weaknesses, with quoted evidence.

plugins.name: vp-cpo-readiness-advisor
plugins.description: Guide the transition to VP or CPO across preparing, interviewing, and recalibrating.

plugins.name: workshop-facilitation
plugins.description: Facilitate workshop sessions with consistent pacing, options, and progress tracking.
